body: Hi, I saw the cohort page through Grace. When does the fall PRIDE cohort start and how do I register?
Thanks for reaching out! The fall cohort runs Tuesdays and Thursdays, 6:30-9:00 PM, October 6 through December 10. I will send the registration link and welcome packet shortly.
My partner works some evenings. Do both of us need to attend every session?
Both prospective parents should attend as much as possible, but we can work with your schedule and make up missed sessions. Let's talk through it.
Is there any cost to take the PRIDE training?
No cost to participants. The training and the workbook are provided. I'll get you on the list.
Do you offer childcare during the evening sessions? We have a toddler.
We don't provide childcare on-site, but several families coordinate a sitter share. I can connect you with others in the cohort.
I rent my home rather than own it. Can I still become a foster parent and take the training?
Renting is fine. The home study looks at safety and stability, not ownership. Happy to walk you through what to expect.
